description:
The MouthTrackingStreamManager component uses streaming data from the ValueStream component (seen in the user Inspector) to control the mouth on a user's avatar.

}}

fields.User: The referenced user to get the streamed data.
fields.Jaw: The streamed data for the Jaw.
fields.JawOpen: The streamed data for the Jaw opening.
fields.Tongue: The streamed data for the tongue.
fields.TongueRoll: The streamed data for the tongue rolling.
fields.LipUpperLeftRaise: The streamed data for the lip (upper-left raised).
fields.LipUpperRightRaise: The streamed data for the lip (upper-right raised).
fields.LipLowerLeftaise: The streamed data for the lip (lower-left raised).
fields.LipLowerRightRaise: The streamed data for the lip (lower-right raised).
fields.LipUpperHorizontal: The streamed data for the lip (upper-horizontal).
fields.LipLowerHorizontal: The streamed data for the lip (lower-horizontal).
fields.MouthLeftSmileFrown: The streamed data for the mouth (left frown).
fields.MouthRightSmileFrown: The streamed data for the mouth (right frown).
fields.MouthLeftDimple: The stream for pushing the area closest to the corners of the lips inwards on the left.
fields.MouthRightDimple: The stream for pushing the area closest to the corners of the lips inwards on the right.
fields.MouthPoutLeft: The stream for the mouth kissy amount on the left.
fields.MouthPoutRight: The stream for the mouth kissy amount on the right.
fields.LipTopLeftOverturn: The stream for the amount The top lip is flipping outwards on the left.
fields.LipTopRightOverturn: The stream for the amount The top lip is flipping outwards on the right.
fields.LipBottomLeftOverturn: The stream for the amount The bottom lip is flipping outwards on the left.
fields.LipBottomRightOverturn: The stream for The amount The bottom lip is flipping outwards on the right.
fields.LipTopLeftOverUnder: The stream for the amount the top lip is going up to cover the bottom lip left.
fields.LipTopRightOverUnder: The stream for the amount the top lip is going up to cover the bottom lip right.
fields.LipBottomLeftOverUnder: The stream for the amount the bottom lip is going up to cover the top lip left.
fields.LipBottomRightOverUnder: The stream for the amount the bottom lip is going up to cover the top lip right.
fields.LipLeftStretchTighten: The stream for the amount the left side of the lips are pulling towards the outside.
fields.LipRightStretchTighten: The stream for the amount the right side of the lips are pulling towards the outside.
fields.LipsLeftPress: The stream for the amount the left side of the lips are pulling towards the inside.
fields.LipsRightPress: The stream for the amount the right side of the lips are pulling towards the inside.
fields.CheekLeftPuffSuck: The streamed data for the cheek (left puff).
fields.CheekRightPuffSuck: The streamed data for the cheek (right puff).
fields.CheekLeftRaise: The stream for how much the cheek area of the left side of the face is being pushed upwards (Usually caused by smile) (negative to positive one)
fields.CheekRightRaise: The stream for how much the cheek area of the right side of the face is being pushed upwards (Usually caused by smile) (negative to positive one)
fields.NoseWrinkleLeft: The stream for how much the left side of the nose is being pushed up.
fields.NoseWrinkleRight: The stream for how much the right side of the nose is being pushed up.
fields.ChinRaiseBottom: The stream for how much the bottom chin is being pulled up.
fields.ChinRaiseTop: The stream for how much the top chin is being pulled up.
